_comment: Add this to your ~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key

PreToolUse._comment: Supply chain audit — intercepts npm/pip/composer/yarn install BEFORE it runs. Blocks known-malicious packages. Warns on install scripts and typosquats.

hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'npm (install|i |ci |update)|yarn (add|upgrade)|pnpm (add|install|update)|pip3? install|composer require|cargo add' && CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" bash ~/.claude/hooks/pkg-install-audit.sh || true

PreToolUse._comment: Warn before editing critical files — use /safe-edit instead
Remind to run /security before git push

PostToolUse._comment: Remind to use /commit after git add
